tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: He described three laws of motion still taught in physics
She discovered the elements polonium and radium
He published On the Origin of Species in 1859
He explained how gravity works after observing a falling apple
She was the first person to win two Nobel Prizes
He travelled on HMS Beagle to study wildlife
He invented the first practical electric light bulb
She carried out pioneering research on radioactivity
He proposed the theory of evolution by natural selection
He developed calculus independently around the same time as Leibniz
He formulated the theory of relativity and the equation E=mc2
He invented the phonograph and held over a thousand patents
